description: Semantic layer for retail stores, e-commerce, omnichannel, and consumer brands. Covers sales performance, inventory management, customer behaviour, and merchandising.

entities.name: Product
entities.description: A sellable product or SKU in the assortment
entities.operational_meaning: Core entity for sales, inventory, margin, and assortment analytics

entities.name: Customer
entities.description: Individual or organisation that purchases products
entities.operational_meaning: Used for CLV, segmentation, churn, and personalisation analytics

entities.name: Transaction
entities.description: A completed sales event or purchase
entities.operational_meaning: Primary source for revenue, basket analysis, and conversion metrics

entities.name: Store
entities.description: Physical retail location or selling channel
entities.operational_meaning: Used for store performance benchmarking, cluster analysis, and space planning

entities.name: Category
entities.description: Hierarchical grouping of products for merchandising
entities.operational_meaning: Used for category performance, space allocation, and buyer responsibility

entities.name: Inventory
entities.description: Current quantity of a product available at a location
entities.operational_meaning: Used for stockout risk, over-stock identification, and replenishment decisions

entities.name: Return
entities.description: Product returned by a customer for refund or exchange
entities.operational_meaning: Used for return rate, net revenue, and quality/fraud analysis

entities.name: Supplier
entities.description: Entity that supplies products to the retailer
entities.operational_meaning: Used for supplier fill rates, lead times, terms, and compliance

vocabulary.definition: Percentage of inventory received that was sold in a period
Gross Margin Return on Inventory Investment — profit generated per unit of inventory cost
Average number of items or value per transaction
Product with zero or negative inventory at a selling location
Reduction in inventory value due to theft, damage, or administrative error
vocabulary.sql_hint: expected_inventory - actual_inventory OR shrink_amount FROM inventory_adjustments WHERE reason_code = 'SHRINK'

vocabulary.definition: Permanent price reduction taken on a product to clear stock
Percentage of store visits or website sessions that result in a purchase
Process of restocking a location when inventory falls below a trigger point

suggested_questions: What are the top 10 products by revenue this week?
Which categories have the lowest sell-through rate this month?
Show me stockout risk by store for our top 50 SKUs
What is the return rate by product category for the last 30 days?
Which stores have the highest basket size this quarter?
Show me GMROI by department vs target
Which suppliers have the lowest fill rate this month?
What products are below their reorder point right now?

alert_templates.name: Stockout Alert
alert_templates.description: Critical SKUs have zero available inventory
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(*) FROM inventory WHERE on_hand_qty <= 0 AND sku_status = 'ACTIVE'

alert_templates.name: High Return Rate
alert_templates.description: Return rate for a product or category has spiked
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(returns) / COUNT(sales) * 100 GROUP BY category WHERE period = CURRENT_WEEK

alert_templates.name: Low Sell-Through
alert_templates.description: Seasonal product sell-through is running below target
